title: COST Action CA23136 — CHIROMAG
description: Primary network watchlist for chirality in spin–lattice interactions, including chiral phonons, phonomagnetism, workshops, training schools, STSMs and conference grants.

title: SPICE-SPIN+X Seminars
description: Recurring seminars and workshops on spin, orbital, magnon and phonon angular-momentum phenomena.

title: Transport and transfer of angular momentum: magnons, chiral phonons and beyond
description: Experimental and theoretical workshop on angular-momentum transport and exchange across magnons, phonons and other quasiparticles.

title: CECAM — Chiral Phonons in Quantum Materials
description: Dedicated cross-community programme spanning spintronics, 2D optoelectronics, ultrafast dynamics, transport and Hall effects.

title: CECAM workshop calendar
description: Monitor for nonlinear phononics, electron–phonon interactions, quantum materials dynamics, ultrafast spectroscopy and cavity materials meetings.

title: APS Global Physics Summit
description: Track sessions and abstracts for chiral phonons, coherent phonons, ultrafast magnetism, spin–lattice dynamics and topological phononics.

title: MRS Meetings & Events
description: Monitor Spring and Fall Meeting programmes for coherently driven phonons, THz quantum materials, magno-phononics and ultrafast lattice control.
